name: Foundation Flow
description: A complete foundation yoga practice covering seated work, backbends, standing poses, inversions, and deep relaxation.
_totalDurationNote: Approximate — some steps are student-paced. Calculated assuming minimums for open-ended holds.

items.name: Sun Salutation A
items._todo: TODO: Flow editor needs flow-level repeat support. Currently repeat=3 means the full sequence plays 3 times (3 min per round).

poses.name: Mountain Pose
poses._note: TODO: mountain-pose poseId missing from pose-library.json. Using standing-prayer as closest match. Create mountain-pose entry or confirm substitute.

poses.name: Mountain Pose
poses._note: TODO: mountain-pose poseId missing. Using standing-prayer.

items.name: Easy Seat
items._todo: TODO: Multi-phase step needed. First 60s right leg forward (front + easy-seat-fold), second 60s left leg forward (easy-seat-other-leg + easy-seat-fold-other-leg).
items.description: Fold deeply into the block. Long, restful hold. No rush.

items.name: Fire Log
items.description: Prep for full lotus. Protect the knees — students find their own edge here.

items.name: Cobblers (Baddha Konasana) with Twists
items._todo: TODO: Multi-phase step with individual sub-step durations within a single pose.

phases.name: Right Ear to Block
phases.description: Block(s) beside right ear, rotate and press.

items.description: Multi-phase cobblers with forward fold and ear-to-block twists.

items.name: Seated Wide-Legged Forward Fold

phases.name: Left Elbow Down, Right Arm to Toe
Right Elbow Down, Left Arm to Toe

items.description: Seated straddle with side twists and deep forward fold.

items.name: Swan
items.description: Fluid — like upward dog or cobra but with more ease and openness. Not a static hold; encourage gentle movement.

items.name: Bow — Outside Grip
items.description: Grab feet on the outside edge. Open chest, breathe into the front body.

items.name: Bow — Inside Grip
items.description: Grab feet on the inside edge. Subtle shift in shoulder and chest opening.

items.name: Locust
items._reviewFlag: poseId 'locus' is likely a typo for 'locust'. Do not auto-fix — requires manual rename of poseId, file paths, and variant keys.
items.description: After two rounds of bow, this is a shorter back-strengthening hold.

items.name: Cat / Cow + Wrist Warm-Up
items._todo: TODO: Part B (wrist warm-up) is rep-based (10 reps × 4 directions), not time-based. Flow editor needs rep counter mode. Durations below are estimates. Optional Lion's Pose at end has no SVG — text cue only or skip.

items.name: Cow Face — First Side (Right Leg Over Left)
items._todo: TODO: Multi-phase step — 7 sub-steps at 30 seconds each.
items.description: Full cow face sequence — first side with twists, arm binds, and forward fold.

items.name: Garland (Malasana)
items.transitionNote: Come directly out of Cow Face into a deep squat.
items.description: Deep squat with twists.

items.name: Cow Face — Second Side (Left Leg Over Right)
items._todo: TODO: Mirror of Step 12 using remaining cow-face variants.
items.description: Full cow face sequence — second side.

items.name: Scale
items._todo: TODO: Student-paced step — hold as long as you can, tap to advance. 20s is suggested minimum.
items.transitionNote: Press up directly from Cow Face (seated).
items.modification: L-press or one-leg L-press if full scale is not accessible.
items.description: Hold as long as possible. Minimum 20 seconds suggested.

items.name: Boat
items.description: Low to high boat transition.

items.name: Reverse Plank
items.description: Find comfort in the pose before committing to the hold.

items.name: Rock and Roll
items._todo: TODO: PLACEHOLDER — swap poseId to 'rock-and-roll' once SVG is created. This is a transition step, not a held pose. Flow editor needs transition-type step support.
items.description: Roll spine along the mat from seated to standing. Transition step.

items.name: Standing Forward Fold
items.description: Breathe into it. Recovery/arrival moment after coming to standing.

items.name: One-Legged Mountain Pose
items._todo: TODO: After this step, display text cue 'Om Namah Shivaya'. Flow editor needs text/audio cue step support with phonetic display for Sanskrit mantras.
items.description: Balance pose with side switch.

items.name: Standing Wide-Legged Forward Fold
items.description: Use the long side of the mat. Feet wide, hands gently pressing to the earth.

items.name: Headstand
items._todo: TODO: Student-paced step — tap to advance. Duration is a minimum fallback. Flow editor needs modification display for alternate SVG (clasped-hands variation).
items.transitionNote: Come directly from standing wide-legged fold.
items.modification: Clasped-hands-behind-back variation for those not inverting.
items.description: Student-paced inversion.

items.name: Standing Wide-Legged Forward Fold (Return)
items.description: Recovery after headstand. Breathe, let the spine decompress.

items.name: Bridge
items.transitionNote: Transition from standing down to the mat.
items.description: Press feet firmly, lift hips.

items.name: Wind Relief Pose
items.description: Gentle knee-to-chest with side switch.

items.name: Supine Twist

phases.name: Supine Twist — Long Leg Other Side

items.description: Arms outstretched, gaze opposite to crossing leg. Long-leg extension deepens the reach.

items.name: Savasana
items._todo: TODO: Open-ended final step — no auto-advance. Student ends session manually. 180s (3 min) is suggested minimum. Flow editor needs terminal step support.
items.description: Full relaxation. No chime. Student ends the session manually.
